text.title: Testing Patterns (Cross-Language) Output Contract
text.summary: JSON-schema output contract the subagent applying testing-patterns must produce. Required fields, forbidden patterns, allowed transformations, plus valid + invalid worked examples.

section.title: Output schema (JSON Schema draft-07)

required.field: POM if UI tests exist, else `none`.

forbidden.pattern: No tests that share mutable global state between cases.
No `if/else` branches inside tests — one branch = one test.
No magic numbers in assertions — name the constant.

allowed-transformations.transformation: Order arrays deterministically by their natural key (slug, id, name) before serialising.
Round numeric values to 2 decimal places when serialising.

example.note: Missing the first required field and `forbidden_seen` is non-empty — schema rejects both.

list.item: All required fields present and non-null.
